use std::collections::HashMap;

type Graph = HashMap<u64, Vec<u64>>;

fn has_path(graph: &Graph, start: u64, end: u64) -> bool {
    if start == end {
        return true;
    }
    if let Some(neighbors) = graph.get(&start) {
        for &next in neighbors {
            if has_path(graph, next, end) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    false
}
